### Current Problem
> What's the problem? (readability, performance, design debt, etc.)

### Proposed Change
> How will it be changed?

### Scope of Impact
> List of files, modules, or APIs that will change.

### Notes
> Can this be done without behavior changes? Does test coverage need to be checked first?
